# Acme Corp

Acme Corp is a technology company specialising in knowledge management platforms and intelligent search infrastructure. Founded in 2018, the company builds tools that help organisations make better use of their internal documentation and institutional knowledge.

## Overview

Acme Corp operates globally with engineering teams distributed across multiple time zones. The company follows an open-source-first approach, contributing to several community projects related to search, natural language processing, and document management.

## Products and Services

Acme Corp's primary product is a knowledge platform that combines full-text search with semantic retrieval to help teams find relevant information quickly. The platform supports multiple document formats, integrates with common productivity tools, and provides an API for programmatic access.

## Engineering Culture

The engineering team at Acme Corp practises test-driven development with a strong emphasis on automated testing at all levels of the test pyramid. Code reviews are mandatory for all changes, and the team maintains comprehensive architecture decision records to document significant technical choices.

## Relationship

Acme Corp is a strategic partner providing infrastructure expertise and contributing to the reference library curation process. Key contacts include Alice Smith (Principal Engineer) and Bob Jones (Senior Data Engineer).
